basic_details.job_title: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 06 IAEO, AAO and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment), Assistant Director (Statistics)
basic_details.short_information: Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission has issued an official notification for the recruitment of Internal Accounts Examiner Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment) and Assistant Director (Statistics) posts under Advertisement No. 08/2026, 09/2026 & 10/2026.

application_fee.details: Application fee details are given in the detailed notification (category-wise). Fee must be paid online or through MP Online kiosk. Fee once paid will not be refunded.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for the respective posts. | Age Limit (as on 01.01.2027): 21 - 40 years (relaxation as per MP Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Divyang etc.) Educational Qualification: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer: Post Graduate Degree in Statistics / Mathematics / Economics with at least Second Division Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment): Post Graduate in Commerce or B.Com with Cost & Works Accountancy + PGDCA in Computer Application Assistant Director (Statistics): Post Graduate in Economics / Statistics / Mathematics / Agriculture + PGDCA in Computer Application Other Requirements: Valid Employment Registration (for MP residents) / No Objection Certificate (for serving employees)

salary_details.details: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer: Rs. 42,700 - 1,35,100 (Level-10) Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment) & Assistant Director (Statistics): Rs. 56,100 - 1,77,500 + 5400 Grade Pay

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of online application Document verification Personal Interview (100 marks) If number of applications is large
a Written Exam may be conducted followed by Interview Final selection on the basis of Interview marks (or Written + Interview marks)
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only and send the hard copy with documents.
Step 2: Register and fill the online application form with all required details
Step 3: Upload scanned documents and pay the application fee
Step 4: Take printout of the submitted form
Step 5: Send the hard copy of the online application along with all self-attested documents to the Commission office by 16 September 2026

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria for the respective posts. Age Limit (as on 01.01.2027): 21 - 40 years (relaxation as per MP Government rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/Divyang etc.) Educational Qualification: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer: Post Graduate Degree in Statistics / Mathematics / Economics with at least Second Division Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment): Post Graduate in Commerce or B.Com with Cost & Works Accountancy + PGDCA in Computer Application Assistant Director (Statistics): Post Graduate in Economics / Statistics / Mathematics / Agriculture + PGDCA in Computer Application Other Requirements: Valid Employment Registration (for MP residents) / No Objection Certificate (for serving employees)

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 Salary
content_sections.text: Internal Accounts Examiner Officer: Rs. 42,700 - 1,35,100 (Level-10) Assistant Accounts Officer / Assistant Director (Accounts & Establishment) & Assistant Director (Statistics): Rs. 56,100 - 1,77,500 + 5400 Grade Pay

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Application fee details are given in the detailed notification (category-wise). Fee must be paid online or through MP Online kiosk. Fee once paid will not be refunded.

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 Application Form
content_sections.text: The online application process has started. The last date to submit the online application form is 03 September 2026 . Hard copy of the application along with all self-attested documents must reach the Commission by 16 September 2026 . Click to Apply Online for MPPSC Recruitment 2026

content_sections.heading: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting on the basis of online application Document verification Personal Interview (100 marks) If number of applications is large, a Written Exam may be conducted followed by Interview Final selection on the basis of Interview marks (or Written + Interview marks)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MPPSC Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must apply online only and send the hard copy with documents. Step 1: Visit www.mppsc.mp.gov.in or www.mponline.gov.in Step 2: Register and fill the online application form with all required details Step 3: Upload scanned documents and pay the application fee Step 4: Take printout of the submitted form Step 5: Send the hard copy of the online application along with all self-attested documents to the Commission office by 16 September 2026

faq.question: Q1. What is MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: MPPSC Recruitment 2026 is a government job notification released by the Madhya Pradesh Public Service Commission for various administrative and accounts-related posts. The recruitment includes positions like Internal Accounts Examiner Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer, and Assistant Director. Eligible candidates can apply online and submit the required documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 06 vacancies have been announced under MPPSC Recruitment 2026 across multiple posts. These include Internal Accounts Examiner Officer, Assistant Accounts Officer, and Assistant Director (Statistics). The vacancies are distributed across different advertisement numbers issued by the commission.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must have a relevant postgraduate degree such as in Commerce, Economics, Statistics, or Mathematics depending on the post. Some posts also require additional qualifications like PGDCA in Computer Applications. Applicants must carefully check post-wise eligibility criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates is between 21 to 40 years as on 01 January 2027. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per Madhya Pradesh government rules. Candidates must ensure they meet the age criteria before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee details are mentioned in the official notification and vary by category. Candidates must pay the fee online or through MP Online kiosks during the application process. The fee once paid is non-refundable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes shortlisting, document verification, and a personal interview. If a large number of applications are received, a written examination may also be conducted. Final selection is based on interview marks or combined written and interview performance.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for MPPSC posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies by post, with Internal Accounts Examiner Officer receiving ₹42,700–₹1,35,100. Assistant Accounts Officer and Assistant Director posts offer ₹56,100–₹1,77,500 with additional grade pay. These pay scales are as per government norms and 7th Pay Commission.

faq.question: Q8. What are the important dates for MPPSC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 04 August 2026 and ends on 03 September 2026. The last date for submitting the hard copy of the application is 16 September 2026. Candidates must complete both steps within the given timeline.
